    *   The evidence lists `'key': 'Sidney Olcott', 'value': 0`. Sidney Olcott was historically the director of *From the Manger to the Cross* (1912).

While historically Sidney Olcott was American (born in Boston), the claim asserts he was Scottish. The provided evidence contains no data to support the nationality or the acting role of the director.
